svg.title: What shifting 15 minutes a day looks like
svg.desc: What shifting 15 minutes a day looks like. Source: Author estimate: 15 minutes moved from reels to education/learning. Illustrative reallocation. Actual shifts depend on individual choices; other activities are held constant.
